author: .paulharris
content: in create attestation data on the api, post gloas if i pass the index in (now optional) should the bn ignore it?

author: nflaig
content: the bn should already ignore it post electra

author: .paulharris
content: so if the VC passes it in, i do my own thing anyway?

author: nflaig
content: is what we have, we only use the `committee_index` pre-electra

author: .paulharris
content: ok cool - that makes life easy

author: nflaig
content:
I am not sure all beacon nodes are happy right now if you omit the `committee_index` query param, even if they don't use it to set the `index` in the attestation data

after gloas, ideally all clients should be happy with `committee_index` being omitted, we can then remove it in heze

author: nflaig
content: more details here https://github.com/ethereum/beacon-APIs/pull/578, first time we deprecate a query param, so let's see how that goes 😁

author: .paulharris
content: thats fine, i was putting it all the way into the stack and it wont need to be

author: .paulharris
content: i may make a PR to make the description a little more clear about expectations there
